signals.raw:

signals.headline: US Strips Green Cards from 3 Iranians Tied to Regime, Processes for Deportation | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Strips Green Cards from 3 Iranians Tied to Regime, Processes for Deportation | YES | HIGH confidence**  
On Apr 13, 2026, the State Department revoked green cards from Seyed Eissa Hasheimi (son of ex-VP Masoumeh Ebtekar), his wife, and son—linked to the 1979 embassy crisis—forcing their ICE detention and deportation push amid Trump admin's anti-terror stance.[2]

signals.headline: Trump Reiterates Greenland Acquisition Push Post-Iran Ceasefire | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Reiterates Greenland Acquisition Push Post-Iran Ceasefire | NO | MED confidence**  
Trump repeated calls to "take Greenland" in an Apr 6, 2026 briefing and linked it to Iran war/NATO tensions in recent rhetoric, but no confirmed action, deal, or resolution occurred—analysts cite midterm elections and voter fatigue as barriers.[1][4]
